data.title: Apple Nears Earnings As Expectations Remain High
data.description:
Apple Inc. (NASDAQ:AAPL) shares are in the spotlight Thursday ahead of the company’s first-quarter earnings report today after the market closes.

Apple’s Earnings: AI Strategy and iPhone Sales in Focus

Apple heads into its earnings report today after the market closes facing a clear prove-it moment, as investors focus on whether the company's expanding AI initiatives and iPhone demand can translate into meaningful financial growth. Analysts are projecting revenue of $138.42 billion and earnings per share of $2.67, but expectations extend beyond simply beating forecasts, with attention on whether Apple's innovation pipeline is supporting sustained profitability in a competitive landscape. Shares are currently trading around $257, well below the $295 consensus analyst price target, highlighting skepticism the company may look to address with this report.

Apple has beaten earnings estimates in each of the past twelve quarters. In the most recent quarter reported on Oct. 30, the company delivered earnings per share of $1.85, topping estimates of $1.77, while revenue of $102.47 billion slightly exceeded expectations of $102.17 billion. Investors will be watching to see whether Apple can extend that streak in the upcoming release.

Focus will also be on iPhone sales performance, which remains central to Apple's revenue base, along with continued growth in services, a key driver of margins and recurring revenue. Updates on the rollout and adoption of Apple's AI initiatives may also draw attention, as they play an increasingly important role in shaping the company's long-term competitive position.

Apple Shares Trade Flat

AAPL Price Action: At the time of writing, Apple shares are trading 0.51% higher at $257.76, according to data from Benzinga Pro.

Image via Shutterstock

data.title: Progressive Analysts Cut Their Forecasts After Q4 Earnings
data.description:
Progressive Corp (NYSE:PGR) reported better-than-expected fourth-quarter financial results on Wednesday.

Progressive reported quarterly earnings of $4.67 per share which beat the analyst consensus estimate of $4.41 per share. The company reported quarterly sales of $21.093 billion which beat the analyst consensus estimate of $20.101 billion.

Progressive shares rose 0.1% to $212.76 in pre-market trading.

These analysts made changes to their price targets on Progressive following earnings announcement.

  • BMO Capital analyst Michael Zaremski maintained Progressive with a Market Perform and lowered the price target from $239 to $232.
  • Wells Fargo analyst Elyse Greenspan maintained the stock with an Equal-Weight rating and cut the price target from $240 to $220.

data.title: Insights into Allegro Microsystems Q3 Earnings
data.description:
Allegro Microsystems (NASDAQ:ALGM) released its Q3 earnings on Thursday, January 29, 2026 at 07:00 AM.

Here's what's important from the earnings announcement.

Earnings

Allegro Microsystems beat estimated earnings by 25.0%, reporting an EPS of $0.15 versus an estimate of $0.12.

Revenue was down $13.33 million from the same period last year.

Performance in Previous Earnings

In the previous quarter, the company beat on EPS by $0.02, resulting in a 1.0% drop change in the share price the following day.

Here's a look at Allegro Microsystems's past performance:

New investors should note that it is sometimes not an earnings beat or miss that most affects the price of a stock, but the guidance (or forecast).

Guidance

Allegro Microsystems management provided guidance for Q4 2026, expecting earnings between $0.14 and $0.18 per share.
